summary: Regis Mado, a powerful demon, is trying to convince someone ( likely Elric ) to stay by his side for a long time. He wants them to help him reclaim the former glory of Anthromorph and also to become a 'Real Demon'. However, this is not possible without great risks and consequences. Meanwhile, a mysterious figure is taking over Regis' body, and Regis is trying to understand what is happening.
key_moments: Regis Mado tries to convince Elric to stay by his side
A mysterious figure takes over Regis' body
Regis discovers that he has the power to 'evolve'
